name: English Muffin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3 cups flour, yeast, sugar, salt, and baking soda in a large bowl.
2. In a separate container, heat the liquids (milk and water) until very warm (120-130°F).
3. Add the warm liquids to the dry ingredients; stir until well combined.
4. Gradually add the remaining 3 cups of flour to form a stiff batter.
5. Grease two loaf pans and sprinkle with cornmeal.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pans and cover them.
7. Let rise in a warm place for 45 minutes.
8. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes, or microwave each loaf on High for 6 minutes 30 seconds.
9. Remove from pans immediately and cool.
The bread won't brown if baked in the microwave, so don't bake it longer than the specified time. It's still delicious! My favorite way to eat this bread is in thick slices lightly broiled with lots of butter (or margarine) and a cinnamon-sugar mixture.
